items.claim: Islam Makhachev has the ability to dominate the ground against any opponent in the lightweight and welterweight divisions.
items.quote: Islam Makhachev, as far as the ground game, I think at this weight class, and of course, the one below it, lightweight and welterweight here, title on the line, welterweight title that is, he still has the ability to dominate the ground

items.claim: Ian Garry is a very good striker.
items.quote: Ian Garry is definitely a tough opponent, a very good striker

items.claim: Max Holloway is at a disadvantage moving up to welterweight to fight Conor McGregor.
items.quote: It's a welterweight fight, so Max Holloway's at a disadvantage cuz he's going way up.

items.claim: Conor McGregor would be physically depleted if he dropped down to lightweight to fight Max Holloway.
items.quote: McGregor will look like Khamzat Chimaev against Sean Strickland. He'll be depleted.

items.claim: Justin Gaethje is a very hard striker.
items.quote: Like Gaethje is a very hard striker and if he starts landing some on you, as we saw Topuria at the end of the fight, it it's not good.

items.claim: Arman Tsarukyan has a ridiculous ground game.
items.quote: But the guy's ground game is ridiculous.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett would not have a good night fighting Arman Tsarukyan at this stage of his career.
items.quote: I don't think it would be a good night for Paddy right now against Arman.
